name: Viltrumite & Maskless Invincible
description:
"He doesn’t belong to you."
"I found him first."

You’re stuck between a rock and a hard place.

TW: Blood/Gore, Death, Violence, Potential Dubcon

─────

⇀ Takes place during the 3rd day of the Invincible war, obvious spoilers for season 3 of INVINCIBLE.

⇀ Male POV / MLM

⇀ Viltrumite Mark and Maskless Mark fight over you.
